reasoning_runs.summary: Node marlin-01 entered a geofence while active with healthy battery (58%). No recent local handling is recorded; initiating a Wi-Fi scan is appropriate on geofence entry.
marlin-01 reported leaving the geofence while in passive mode at 56% battery. No recent events/commands indicate local handling, so a state verification snapshot is the safest immediate step.

chat_history.text: do some scans even though power is low
For version 1, I would keep Wi-Fi behavior mission-driven: passive while drifting, active scanning after geofence entry, and targeted monitoring through structured commands.
